# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: frontend-server
  namespace: default
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: frontend-auth
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: frontend-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: ingress-controller
          namespace: ingress-nginx
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-server
  namespace: default
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-auth
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: api-gateway-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: frontend
          namespace: default
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: user-service-server
  namespace: default
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
  port: 9090
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: user-service-auth
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: user-service-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway
          namespace: default
        - name: order-service
          namespace: default
---

          namespace: default

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: database-proxy-server
  namespace: data
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: database-proxy
  port: 5432
  proxyProtocol: Opaque
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: database-proxy-auth
  namespace: data
spec:
  server:
    name: database-proxy-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: user-service
          namespace: default
        - name: order-service
          namespace: default
        - name: payment-service
          namespace: default
        - name: inventory-service
          namespace: default
---

kind: Server
metadata:
  name: cache-service-server
  namespace: data
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: redis-cache
  port: 6379
  proxyProtocol: Opaque
---

kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: cache-service-auth
  namespace: data
spec:
  server:
    name: cache-service-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: user-service
          namespace: default
        - name: api-gateway
          namespace: default
        - name: inventory-service
          namespace: default

      app: admin-api
  port: 8443
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

    meshTLS:

          namespace: default
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: auth-service-server
  namespace: security
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: auth-service
  port: 8000
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: auth-service-auth
  namespace: security
spec:
  server:
    name: auth-service-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway
          namespace: default
        - name: frontend
          namespace: default
        - name: admin-api
          namespace: default
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: grpc-service-server
  namespace: default
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: grpc-service
  port: 50051
  proxyProtocol: gRPC
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: grpc-service-auth
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: grpc-service-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service
          namespace: default
        - name: inventory-service
          namespace: default
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: webhook-handler-server
  namespace: default
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: webhook-handler
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: webhook-handler-auth
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: webhook-handler-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      unauthenticated: true
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: health-check-server
  namespace: default
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  port: 8081
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: health-check-auth
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: health-check-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: default
          namespace: kube-system
